company.name: AutoStream
company.tagline: Automated Video Editing Tools for Content Creators
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that provides AI-powered automated video editing tools designed for content creators on YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and other platforms. Our tools help creators save time, enhance quality, and grow their audience.

plans.name: Basic Plan
plans.best_for: Hobbyists and beginners just starting out

policies.refund_policy: No refunds after 7 days from the date of purchase. Refund requests within the 7-day window will be processed within 5-7 business days.

support.basic: Email support only, response within 48 hours
support.pro: 24/7 support available via chat, email, and phone

policies.trial: No free trial currently available. Basic plan is available at $29/month.
policies.cancellation: You can cancel your subscription at any time. Your access continues until the end of the billing period.

features.ai_captions: Automatically generate accurate captions in 30+ languages using our AI engine. Available on Pro plan only.
features.auto_editing: Our AI analyzes your raw footage and creates polished edits automatically, including cuts, transitions, and music sync.
features.templates: Access to 100+ video templates designed for different platforms (YouTube, Instagram Reels, TikTok).
features.4k_rendering: Export videos in stunning 4K quality with fast cloud rendering (Pro plan only).
features.analytics: Track video performance and audience insights directly within AutoStream (Pro plan).
